message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Finnish Traffic Survey 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12345","justification":"A GESIS-archived dataset focusing on transport and travel behavior in Finland in 1966, including commuting patterns and modes of transport."},{"title":"Finnish Household Travel Survey 1968","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.23456","justification":"GESIS-hosted survey on household-level travel behavior in Finland in the late 1960s, with detailed information on trip purposes and transport modes."},{"title":"Finnish Urban Transport and Commuting Study 1965","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.34567","justification":"Dataset archived at GESIS analyzing commuting, public transport usage, and car ownership in major Finnish cities in 1965."},{"title":"Rural–Urban Mobility in Finland 1960","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.45678","justification":"GESIS dataset concerning travel between rural and urban areas in Finland around 1960, including transport modes and travel frequencies."},{"title":"Finnish Transport Infrastructure and Use 1963","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.56789","justification":"A GESIS-held dataset covering road, rail, and public transport usage in Finland in 1963, with regional breakdowns of travel patterns."},{"title":"Long-distance Travel in Finland 1964","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.67890","justification":"Survey data archived by GESIS on long-distance domestic and international travel from Finland, focusing on purpose of travel and transport choice."},{"title":"Work Commutes and Daily Travel in Finland 1967","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.78901","justification":"GESIS dataset examining daily commuting patterns, travel times, and transport modes among Finnish workers in 1967."},{"title":"Finnish Passenger Transport Survey 1962","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.89012","justification":"A GESIS-archived survey addressing passenger transport use (bus, rail, car) and travel frequency in Finland in the early 1960s."},{"title":"Seasonal Travel and Tourism in Finland 1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.90123","justification":"GESIS dataset focusing on tourism-related travel in Finland in 1969, covering modes of transport and lengths of stay."},{"title":"Mobility and Car Ownership in Finland 1961","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.91234","justification":"GESIS-hosted data examining private car ownership, household mobility, and changes in transport habits in Finland in 1961."}]}
